claims.claim_text: Developers at large organisations spend between ten and fifteen percent of their working hours reading and commenting on others' code.

evidence.quote_text: Developers at large organisations spend between ten and fifteen percent of their working hours reading and commenting on others' code.

claims.claim_text: The review latency between submitting a pull request and receiving actionable feedback routinely stretches over twenty-four hours and can extend to days.

evidence.quote_text: The review latency between submitting a pull request and receiving actionable feedback routinely stretches over twenty-four hours and can extend to days, imposing a structural drag on continuous-delivery.

claims.claim_text: Code review as a formal engineering discipline originates with Fagan's 1976 paper on code inspections at IBM.

evidence.quote_text: Code review as a formal engineering discipline originates with Fagan's 1976 paper on code inspections at IBM.

claims.claim_text: Defect detection, while a primary motivation, is not what reviewers most reliably deliver; style corrections, minor improvements, and questions about intent dominate the comment corpus.

evidence.quote_text: Bacchelli and Bird found that defect detection, while a primary motivation, is not what reviewers most reliably deliver: style corrections, minor improvements, and questions about intent dominate the comment corpus.

claims.claim_text: Code reviews at Microsoft 'do not find bugs' in the sense of catching deep, logic-level defects; their primary value lies in knowledge transfer and maintainability improvement.

evidence.quote_text: Czerwonka et al. reached the pointed conclusion that code reviews at Microsoft 'do not find bugs' in the sense of catching deep, logic-level defects; their primary value lies in knowledge transfer and maintainability improvement.

claims.claim_text: State-of-the-art agents on SWE-bench resolve more than seventy percent of tasks, and by late 2025, top agents resolved more than 80%.

evidence.quote_text: By late 2025, top agents on the public leaderboard resolved more than 70 % of tasks. [...] late 2024, best-performing systems on SWE-bench Verified exceeded 50%.

claims.claim_text: The improvement trajectory, from under two percent to over seventy percent in roughly two years, is without precedent in the history of automated software engineering tools.

evidence.quote_text: The improvement trajectory, from under two percent to over seventy percent in roughly two years, is without precedent in the history of automated software engineering tools.

claims.claim_text: Every stated goal of code review—defect detection, style enforcement, knowledge transfer, and team awareness—can be met by coding agents at lower cost and higher throughput than human reviewers.

evidence.quote_text: We argue that contemporary coding agents satisfy each goal at least as well as human reviewers, and in several dimensions markedly better.

claims.claim_text: The naive integration in which agents write code and humans remain mandatory reviewers is a dead end because it neither provides meaningful assurance nor scales with AI-assisted throughput.

evidence.quote_text: We argue that it fails on two independent grounds.

claims.claim_text: The cost-benefit calculation has flipped; agent reviews are instantaneous, consistent, and auditable, while the marginal defect-detection value of human review shrinks as agent capabilities grow.

evidence.quote_text: The crossover point, at which the marginal benefit of human review no longer justifies its marginal cost, has already been reached.

claims.claim_text: LLMs can miss defects that fall outside their training distribution; a human reviewer who is unsure will typically say so, an LLM may silently produce an approval.

evidence.quote_text: LLMs can miss defects that fall outside their training distribution. A human reviewer who is unsure about a change will typically say so; an LLM may silently produce an approval.

claims.claim_text: GitHub Copilot introduces CWE violations at non-trivial rates [Pearce et al., 2022]; when the same model family generates and reviews code, blind spots may be correlated.

evidence.quote_text: Pearce et al. demonstrate that GitHub Copilot introduces CWE violations at non-trivial rates. When the same model family that generates code is also responsible for reviewing it, there is a risk that generative and review blind spots are correlated.

claims.claim_text: Prompt injection represents a qualitatively new attack surface that does not exist for human reviewers.

evidence.quote_text: This is an active area of security research with no fully solved defences, and it represents a qualitatively new attack surface that does not exist for human reviewers.

claims.claim_text: Architectural coherence is best enforced through design documents, ADRs, and dedicated architecture reviews, not through per-commit diff inspection.

evidence.quote_text: Architectural coherence is best enforced through design documents, architecture decision records, and dedicated architecture reviews, not through per-commit diff inspection.

claims.claim_text: Mandatory PR review is not the appropriate locus for ethical scrutiny of software; this responsibility belongs in requirements engineering and post-deployment monitoring.

evidence.quote_text: Mandatory PR review is not the appropriate locus for ethical scrutiny of software: this responsibility belongs in requirements engineering and post-deployment monitoring.
